rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEON J. WILLIAMS REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 10/5/99 TRUST
rulings.Rulings: Betty William's Motion for Summary Judgment, or, in the Alternative, for Summary Adjudication is continued on the Court's own motion to February 25, 2022, at 9:00 a.m. No additional filings will be accepted or considered.
